response.justification: Aisha Okonkwo demonstrates strong software engineering leadership, distributed systems experience, and event-driven architecture design through her work at re:cinq, Dunnhumby, and GISCollective. However, her resume lacks direct experience in AI-agent systems, fintech infrastructure, or regulated environments, which are critical for this CTO role. Her background in real-time systems and distributed architectures is relevant, but the gap in agentic AI and fintech-specific expertise significantly reduces her overall fit.
strengths: Extensive backend and distributed systems experience with event-driven architectures (Dunnhumby, GISCollective)
Proven leadership in scaling engineering teams and implementing disciplined development practices (Optilyz, Altom Consulting)
Strong foundation in real-time systems, microservices, and production-grade software (re:cinq, National Instruments)
concerns: No demonstrated experience with multi-agent AI systems or production LLM deployments
Limited exposure to fintech infrastructure (credit systems, payment flows, regulated environments)
Lacks track record in scaling engineering teams beyond 10-20 people or leading hybrid engineering models
